decisions.decision: Add isNormalDebit() to AccountType enum; branch balance update by account type
decisions.rationale: ASSET/EXPENSE increase on debit, LIABILITY/EQUITY/REVENUE increase on credit. Standard double-entry accounting.

decisions.decision: Add amountPaid field to RepaymentSchedule + Liquibase migration
decisions.rationale: Track partial payment state. Schedule paid only when amountPaid >= totalAmount.

decisions.decision: Recalculate interest on actual remaining principal for last installment
decisions.rationale: Interest must reflect true balance, not stale value from prior iteration.

decisions.decision: Externalize to application.yml with env var placeholders
decisions.rationale: Standard Spring externalized config. No secrets in source.

decisions.decision: Change .anyRequest().permitAll() to .authenticated()
decisions.rationale: Secure default: all unmapped routes require authentication.

decisions.decision: Extract member ID from JWT; MEMBER can only access own data; TREASURER/ADMIN access any
decisions.rationale: Uses @PreAuthorize with SecurityContextHolder for authorization checks.

decisions.decision: Prefix formula characters with single quote in escapeCsv()
decisions.rationale: OWASP recommendation for CSV injection prevention.

decisions.decision: Single new Liquibase changeset with ON DELETE RESTRICT FKs
decisions.rationale: Financial data should never cascade-delete. One changeset for all FKs.

decisions.decision: Load from application.yml properties with dev fallback
decisions.rationale: Persistent keys survive restarts and support clustering.

decisions.decision: Replace custom impl with java-uuid-generator library
decisions.rationale: Battle-tested library eliminates bit manipulation risk.

decisions.decision: Add log.error to generic exception handler
decisions.rationale: Stack traces must be logged for debugging.

decisions.decision: Add @Version to BaseEntity + migration
decisions.rationale: Financial system needs concurrency protection.

decisions.decision: Single save with REPAYING status
decisions.rationale: Eliminates intermediate DISBURSED state.

decisions.decision: Use DB sequence for journal entry numbers
decisions.rationale: Natively atomic, no race conditions.

decisions.decision: Add @DecimalMax(100.0) validation
decisions.rationale: Reasonable upper bound for chama loans.

decisions.decision: Use UUID v7 substring for uniqueness
decisions.rationale: Time-ordered, unique, non-predictable.

decisions.decision: Add fromDate < toDate validation
decisions.rationale: Prevents nonsensical date ranges.

decisions.decision: Fix page break to continue on new page
decisions.rationale: Current break truncates output silently.

decisions.decision: Add rollback definitions to existing changesets
decisions.rationale: Enables safe rollback of any migration.

decisions.decision: Add UNIQUE on reference_number columns
decisions.rationale: Prevents duplicate reference numbers at DB level.

decisions.decision: Restrict actuator to ADMIN; Swagger behind auth in prod
decisions.rationale: Defense in depth for information disclosure.

constraints: All fixes must compile with mvn compile -q
Liquibase migrations must be additive (new changesets only)
Existing API contracts must not break
Module isolation: no new cross-module dependencies
Financial calculation fixes are highest priority
